brand.name: MinRosh Migration
brand.tagline: Your future in Australia, guided with clarity.

hero.title: Unlock New Horizons: Your trusted partner in Australian migration.
hero.description: Preliminary guidance for skilled, employer-sponsored, student, and family pathways, shaped into a calm plan you can actually follow.

stats.label: Structured guidance from eligibility to lodgement
Focused enquiries, WhatsApp access, and consultation booking

about.title: Guidance that feels calm, clear, and practical
about.body: MinRosh Migration is designed for people who need order in a complex process. We break migration planning into clear stages, explain what matters now, and help you prepare for the right next move rather than rushing toward the wrong application.
points: Preliminary points guidance for skilled migration pathways
Support for students, families, and employer-sponsored options
Structured preparation before formal case review or lodgement

services.title: Skilled Migration
services.summary: Strategic guidance for subclass 189, 190, and related skilled pathways, including points planning, EOI readiness, and document preparation.

services.title: Employer-Sponsored Options
services.summary: Support for applicants exploring employer-backed pathways when direct PR is not the strongest immediate option.

services.title: Student & Graduate Support
services.summary: Guidance for education-linked migration planning, course selection context, and how study choices can connect to longer-term goals.

services.title: Family & Complex Cases
services.summary: Clear initial guidance for family-based situations and cases that need careful sequencing, documentation, or referral to formal advice.

pathwaySteps.title: Initial Assessment
pathwaySteps.description: Check your age, points profile, occupation fit, and likely pathway options.

pathwaySteps.title: Skills Assessment
pathwaySteps.description: Verify qualifications and employment evidence with the relevant assessing authority.

pathwaySteps.title: English Test & EOI
pathwaySteps.description: Strengthen your points profile and prepare a competitive Expression of Interest.

pathwaySteps.title: State Nomination
pathwaySteps.description: Explore nomination pathways that can lift your competitiveness for 190 or regional options.

pathwaySteps.title: Visa Lodgement
pathwaySteps.description: Prepare the final application package with a clean, consistent document set.

successStories.name: A. Fernando
successStories.quote: The structured points review made the process feel manageable. We knew exactly what to improve before moving forward.
successStories.outcome: Moved from a scattered document set to a confident 189-ready pathway.

successStories.name: R. Perera
successStories.quote: What helped most was the clarity. Instead of generic advice, we got a sequence that made sense for our profile and timing.
successStories.outcome: Improved English planning and evidence readiness before EOI.

successStories.name: S. Wickramasinghe
successStories.quote: MinRosh explained the points system in plain language and helped us understand where we actually stood.
successStories.outcome: Identified a realistic skilled pathway and prepared for the next stage with confidence.
